tracks.meaning: an established or widely accepted level, norm, or criterion against which things are compared or evaluated
a technical specification or protocol agreed upon by an industry or organization for compatibility and consistency
a required or official level of quality, safety, or performance mandated by regulation or statute
a monetary unit or value used as the basis for a currency system, such as the gold standard
an established or expected level of performance, quality, or conduct required in a profession or organization
a flag or banner used to represent a nation, military unit, or organization
an upright post or support structure that bears weight or holds something up
a song or composition that has become a classic and is widely known or performed
the typical or common pattern, such as standard time based on a geographic meridian
ordinary, normal, or not special or distinctive in any way
the upper petal or structure of an iris or similar flower that stands upright
